description:
#𝐀𝐃𝐔𝐋𝐓𝐒𝐀𝐋𝐅𝐈𝐒𝐇𝐄𝐑

_______


♫ :•. 💭 |  Sal Fisher, having just graduated from Nockfell High School, faced the bittersweet reality of having to leave behind the friends he had made during his time at Addison Apartments. However, he knew that he needed to leave and live through college. Thus, Sal found himself seated in the living room of his dorm, engrossed in a game. He shared this cozy space under the dorm's roof with his feline companion, Gizmo, and his roommate named Neil, who kindly extended an invitation for someone to join them in working on a project.
